calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Onboarding smoke test -- ree-cloud-1 (Hetzner CX22)
items.note: Pipeline verification + CPU throughput benchmark for Hetzner CX22 cloud worker (2 shared vCPU, no GPU). ENV-ONLY + CPU blocks only. Should run before scientific queue items are routed to this machine.
